notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Jose Altuve to shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker. Zach Neto scores. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Yusei Kikuchi. Jeremy Peña scores. Throwing error by catcher Logan O'Hoppe.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Soler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler grounds into a double play, third baseman Carlos Correa to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Nolan Schanuel out at 2nd. Jorge Soler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Yusei Kikuchi. Jeremy Peña scores. Throwing error by catcher Logan O'Hoppe.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
